title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Sasken Technologies Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Sasken Technologies Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Sasken Technologies Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sasken Technologies Holdings Services:
Sasken Technologies Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sasken Technologies Holdings Services!
